log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:13+-2=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Halfling — Iron Concentration (distant).
--- Halfling — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:3+3=6 vs DC 15] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 135/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Halfling — Iron Concentration (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 28 damage. Halfling — Iron Concentration HP: 39/67
--- Halfling — Iron Concentration --- HP: 39/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.

→ Rock: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 32 damage. Halfling — Iron Concentration HP: 7/67
--- Halfling — Iron Concentration --- HP: 7/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (7/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Halfling — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Halfling — Iron Concentration (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 26 damage. Halfling — Iron Concentration HP: -19/67
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:5+3=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Halfling — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 3 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
